column1: DENVER GARAGE FLOORING — MARKET PRICING RESEARCH
Sources: Galaxy Concrete Coatings, Solid Custom Floor Coatings Denver, BobVila, HomeGuide, Fixr, Angi.
Denver specifically runs $8-$12/sq ft for polyaspartic — higher than national average due to altitude/climate prep needs.
CLICK-IN TILE FLOORING — YOUR PRICING vs MARKET
Your click-in flooring at ~$7.25/sf installed sits right in the middle of the market range. Polyaspartic alternatives run $8-$12/sf in Denver.
Click-in tile is a DIFFERENT product than polyaspartic — but clients may compare them. Your tile is cheaper AND faster to install.
